original_image_tags: Scanned typewritten document on paper. Header in top right reads "Incident: 223a". The body contains two paragraphs labeled "1st rpt" and "2d rpt". Paper shows aging, discoloration, and some punch holes at the top.

elements.description: Typewritten page containing narrative text reports. Visible elements include the label 'Incident: 223a' in the top right, margin labels '1st rpt' and '2d rpt', and typed body text describing an incident. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no actual visual content (no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts) and both quote the same labels ('Incident: 223a', '1st rpt', '2d rpt') on the typewritten document.
